_note: Per-lesson role-play scenario. Grounded in Pre-A1/021 dialogue + vocab. Learner plays Lily; computer plays Ben. Each NPC node offers 2-3 branches so the same lesson language can be reached different ways. Consumed by RP.Engine + RP.classifiers.local (see roleplay/).
title: 021 · My Teddy Bear

routes.meaning: Lily says the bear is cute.
routes.hint: Tell Ben it is cute: “It is so cute!”

routes.meaning: Lily asks to hold the bear.
routes.hint: You can say “It is so cute!” or “Can I hold it?”

partial.message: Tell Ben about his bear: “It is so cute!”

off_topic.message: Ben has a teddy bear. Say “It is so cute!”

npc.text: Sure! Here you go. It is soft.

routes.meaning: Lily says the bear is soft or thanks Ben.
routes.hint: Say how it feels: “It is so soft!”

partial.message: Tell Ben how it feels: “It is so soft!”

off_topic.message: Ben let you hold the bear. Say “It is so soft!”

npc.text: My bear is brown and soft.

routes.hint: Ask its name: “What is its name?”

routes.meaning: Lily likes the brown, soft bear.
routes.hint: You can ask “What is its name?” or say “It is so soft!”

partial.message: Ask about the bear: “What is its name?”

off_topic.message: Ben's bear is brown and soft. Ask “What is its name?”

routes.meaning: Lily asks if Ben sleeps with the bear.
examples: Do you sleep with the bear?
routes.hint: Ask about bedtime: “Do you sleep with it?”
You can ask “Do you sleep with it?” or say “Fluffy is a nice name!”

partial.message: Ask Ben a question: “Do you sleep with it?”

off_topic.message: The bear is named Fluffy. Ask “Do you sleep with it?”

learning_objective: Share that you have one too

routes.meaning: Lily says she has a teddy bear too.
examples: I have a teddy bear too.
Me too, I have a teddy bear.
routes.hint: Share with Ben: “I have a teddy bear too.”
You can say “I have a teddy bear too.” or “That is nice.”

partial.message: Tell Ben about you: “I have a teddy bear too.”

off_topic.message: Ben sleeps with Fluffy. Say “I have a teddy bear too.”

routes.meaning: Lily says teddy bears are the best.
routes.hint: Say how you feel: “Teddy bears are the best!”
You can say “Teddy bears are the best!” or “I hug mine too!”

partial.message: Tell Ben what you think: “Teddy bears are the best!”

off_topic.message: Ben hugs his bear. Say “Teddy bears are the best!”

npc.text: Teddy bears are the best! Good night, Fluffy.
